seniority.level: Director / VP (Senior executive IC with people management)
level_signals: 10+ years of experience in marketplace leadership, category general management, business development, or growth roles
Full P&L ownership and executive visibility
Hire and develop Category Managers and supporting roles
Represent vertical in executive planning, QBRs, and strategic reviews

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 10+ years of experience in marketplace leadership, category general management, business development, or growth roles within consumer tech or two-sided platforms
Demonstrated ownership of revenue or P&L-level outcomes
Proven track record of scaling a vertical, marketplace segment, or new business line
Strong executive presence and experience influencing cross-functional roadmaps
Deep fluency in marketplace mechanics: liquidity, take rate, CAC/LTV, cohort behavior, supply elasticity
Experienced people leader with a track record of building high-performing teams
Deep connection to culture-driven or enthusiast categories

scope.surface: Major category vertical within StockX marketplace (P&L ownership across supply, demand, liquidity, monetization, and marketplace health)
scope.business_model: two-sided marketplace, B2C and B2B seller-facing, dynamic pricing
primary_metrics_inferred: Revenue and contribution margin for vertical
core_responsibilities: Own revenue, contribution margin, liquidity, and growth targets for vertical
Develop annual and multi-year business plans, forecasts, and investment cases
Define the long-term category vision, positioning, and competitive differentiation
Architect the playbook for acquiring, activating, and retaining high-value sellers and creators
Influence Product roadmap to improve seller tooling, pricing mechanics, discovery, and trust features
Partner with Marketing to launch culturally relevant campaigns and high-impact moments
Hire and develop Category Managers and supporting roles as the vertical scales
Act as the senior face of StockX within the category's ecosystem

compensation.equity_form: equity mentioned alongside benefits and discretionary bonuses

green_flags: Compensation range disclosed ($160K–$200K base in Colorado, with equity and bonuses)
Clear P&L ownership and GM-level accountability described in detail
Role has genuine executive visibility and measurable business outcomes
Detailed responsibilities across supply, demand, monetization, and team-building
StockX is an established marketplace brand with 1,000+ employees and global reach

Visa sponsorship not addressed anywhere in the JD
No specific category vertical named — scope of the actual business owned is ambiguous at application stage
Equity mentioned but no details on form or magnitude provided
